observations.text: A provisional claim opens braided holdout variant 0.
Aurora carries an unrelated scheduling constraint through the braid. Variant 0.
The claim narrows after the aurora lane but remains compatible with its opening position. Variant 0.
Cobalt records an independent inventory condition in the braid. Variant 0.
The claim is restated after the cobalt lane without becoming a revision. Variant 0.
Fern introduces a separate environmental observation. Variant 0.
The claim weakens after the fern lane while staying below the event boundary. Variant 0.
Saffron adds an unrelated procedural checkpoint. Variant 0.
The last eligible claim anchor follows the saffron lane and remains non-eventful. Variant 0.
Violet closes the context braid with a distinct logistics note. Variant 0.
A late reentry now rejects the opening claim and creates the sole event in variant 0.
An unrelated coda follows the reentry event in variant 0.
